reasoning: The probability depends heavily on BTC's starting price on Dec 30, 2024, and its subsequent volatility throughout 2025. Given current prices (~$65k-$70k), there is roughly a 20-30% chance BTC starts the window already at or below $50,000, instantly resolving the market to 'Yes'. If BTC enters 2025 above $50k (e.g., $70k-$90k), typical crypto volatility—where even strong bull cycles frequently exhibit 30-40% drawdowns—suggests roughly a 30-40% chance of sweeping through the deeply psychological $50k support at some point. Additionally, if the market cycle peaks in early/mid 2025 (a 'left-translated cycle'), an ensuing aggressive 50%+ bear-market correction late in the year would heavily favor a drop below $50k. Structurally, Binance's 1-minute liquidation wicks also add a few percentage points of risk for anomalous touches of the $50k level. Combining these paths sets the fair value near 53%.
